records.ety: [L. advertere, v. t., to turn to; ad + vertere to turn: cf. F. avertir. See Advertise.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Adverted; p. pr. & vb. n. Adverting.]

defs: To turn the mind or attention; to refer; to take heed or notice; -- with to; as, he adverted to what was said.
quotes: I may again advert to the distinction.
